Appearances:
Plaintiff Yerba Buena Commons Associates Inc. is present. Represented by Mitch Brown.
Attorney Francisco Torres for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gabriel LeRoy is present.
Attorney Robert Sansone appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.504A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Sep-28-2015 is vacated. (501/JPT)
